title: Clumped Clouds
description: Clouds in real life are in big clumps. Why not in Minecraft?
body:
This extremely simple texture pack changes only one thing: The cloud texture. 
Instead of random noise, this resource pack clumps the clouds together so it looks realistic, while also having some noise around the main ones. So if you're tired of seeing ugly noise, just download this!

![The new cloud texture.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b279b05a86fb8459573145ef84d02e060f323086_0.webp)

The new cloud texture.
